case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. HENRY SANDOVAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61397071), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION SERVED NOV-27-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, HENRY AKA RIGO SANDOVAL AKA HENRY A. SANDOVAL, AN INDIVIDUAL

DECLARATION RE: 1. COMPLAINT 2. SUMMONS 3. ADR PACKAGE 4. CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET 5. NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF (TRANSACTION ID # 61397071) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61420701) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, HENRY AKA RIGO SANDOVAL AKA HENRY A. SANDOVAL, AN INDIVIDUAL
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61420701) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, HENRY AKA RIGO SANDOVAL AKA HENRY A. SANDOVAL, AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-16-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-26-2018
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61399550) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, HENRY AKA RIGO SANDOVAL AKA HENRY A. SANDOVAL, AN INDIVIDUAL $249,888.10 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $249,888.10, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
